observations.polarity: Dan resists Lady Astarte's overwhelming physical and spiritual demand
observations.summary: Dan physically resists the oppressive, dense force embodied by Lady Astarte, symbolizing a tension between submission to a powerful spiritual force and the exertion of human will and resistance.

left_evidence.quote: Lady astarte's terrible image expanded. Her form became pure, concentrated mass. The air grew impossibly dense. He felt her terrible weight. She demanded submission.

right_evidence.quote: He braced his whole body. His muscles screamed. He resisted the downward pull. He slammed his hand down. The ground shook. His shibboleth held.

bridge_evidence.quote: The well water began to boil violently, sending up plumes of fragrant steam that coated Dan's face like a shroud, burning his skin, the physical cost of the thermodynamic exchange made immediate.

accepted_observations.summary: Dan physically resists the oppressive, dense force embodied by Lady Astarte, symbolizing a tension between submission to a powerful spiritual force and the exertion of human will and resistance.
